channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: SpaceX Starfall and Varda’s Progress in Commercial Orbital Return Capsules
item.description: The article discusses emerging developments in the commercial recovery of payloads from low Earth orbit, focusing on SpaceX’s Starfall project and Varda Space Industries’ reentry capsules. Demand for ...

item.title: Oil analyst warns U.S. fuel inventories may fall below critical levels amid Strait of Hormuz disruption

item.title: Skepticism follows Dr. Oz’s remarks on President Trump’s repeated medical checkups

item.title: Reports Outline Expected Guests and Notable Absences at Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's Wedding
item.description: The article examines reported details surrounding the anticipated wedding of Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce, which is believed to be scheduled for 3 July in New York. According to entertainment media r...

item.title: Ken Paxton Divorce Trial Canceled as Settlement Discussions Continue

item.title: Google Seeks EPA Approval to Release Sterile Male Mosquitoes in California and Florida to Reduce Disease-Carrying Populations
item.description: Google is seeking approval from the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) to release up to 32 million sterile male mosquitoes over the next two years in California and Florida as part of its Debu...

item.title: Democratic Senate Candidate Criticizes AI-Altered Image of Republican Rival Mike Rogers
item.description: A political dispute emerged in Michigan's closely watched U.S. Senate race after an AI-generated image of Republican candidate Mike Rogers circulated on social media. Abby Ronson, a political operativ...

item.title: Mozambique Returns to ECSA-HC While Sao Tome and Principe Secures Observer Status
item.description: Mozambique has officially rejoined the East, Central and Southern Africa Health Community (ECSA-HC), strengthening regional cooperation in public health across eastern, central and southern Africa. Th...

item.title: Trump Faces Political and Legal Setbacks as Several High-Profile Initiatives Stall
item.description: The article argues that President Donald Trump has recently encountered a series of political and legal setbacks that suggest limits to his ability to advance controversial initiatives. According to t...

item.title: Bodycam footage reveals final moments after fatal stabbing of teenager Henry Nowak in Southampton
item.description: Police have released body-worn camera footage showing officers handcuffing 18-year-old Henry Nowak after he had been fatally stabbed in Southampton on 3 December. The footage, parts of which had its a...

item.title: Questions Raised Over Whether Bill Pulte Meets Legal Requirements to Serve as Acting Director of National Intelligence

item.title: How The Smiths Adapted a Vietnam War Photograph for the Cover of 'Meat Is Murder'
item.description: The article examines the origins of the cover artwork for The Smiths’ 1985 album 'Meat Is Murder', one of the band's most recognizable visual images. The cover features a modified photograph of Americ...

item.title: Nigeria and South Africa Face a Critical Test as Economic Reforms Aim to Restore Growth
item.description: Nigeria and South Africa, the two biggest economies in Africa, are entering an important period as both countries try to recover from years of economic and structural challenges. For more than a decad...

item.title: Integrated Valleytronics Chip Demonstrates On-Chip Generation, Routing, and Detection of Light-Based Information
item.description: Researchers at Monash University have developed a compact photonic chip capable of generating, directing, and detecting information carried by light within a single integrated device. The breakthrough...

item.title: Rubio Clashes With Senator Rosen Over His Role During Pakistan-Iran Peace Negotiations

item.title: Former DHS Chief of Staff Criticizes Markwayne Mullin's Proposal to Disrupt Airport Operations in Sanctuary Cities

item.title: Former Homeland Security official claims Trump is under increased political pressure following recent setbacks
